name: Svalinn
explicitMods: -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage
-10% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage
Trigger a Socketed Elemental Spell on Block, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
flavourText: The priests found the Great Shield the night it fell to Middengard,
but it was the smiths who delved into the secrets it held.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants mana regeneration to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby Allies Regenerate 2.9 Mana per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Engulfs you in magical fire that rapidly burns you and nearby enemies. Your spell damage is substantially increased while under this effect. The effect ends when you have 1 life remaining.
explicitMods: Deals 70% of your Maximum Life as Base Fire Damage per second
Deals 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield as Base Fire Damage per second
You Burn for 90% of your Maximum Life per second as Fire Damage
You Burn for 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield per second as Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
explicitMods: While in Blood Stance, Aura makes Enemies take up to 20% more Physical Damage from Hits
While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 20% less Damage from Enemies in Aura
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

typeLine: Seething Divine Life Flask of Sealing
explicitMods:
Grants Immunity to Bleeding for 7 seconds if used while Bleeding
Grants Immunity to Corrupted Blood for 7 seconds if used while affected by Corrupted Blood
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Blunderbore
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Projectile Gems
explicitMods: 69% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
You have Lesser Brutal Shrine Buff
You have Lesser Massive Shrine Buff
flavourText: The giant cares not for the ants.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have unholy resonance of lightning, physical and chaos, and to grant unholy resonance of damage types other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 unholy resonance for each damage type. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Lightning, Physical or Chaos cause you to gain 25 Unholy Resonance of the other types per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Unholy Resonance per second of each type you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 7% more Damage per 10 of lowest Unholy Resonance
Supported Skills have 90% chance to ignore Enemy Lightning and Chaos Resistance while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills have 90% chance to ignore Enemy Physical Damage Reduction while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: It was a delicate balancing act for Malachai to ensure the loyalty
of his three students - each as ambitious as they were depraved.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the level of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: +4 to Level of Supported Skill Gems
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill. Minions, Totems, Traps and Mines cannot gain Inspiration Charges.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 40% less Mana Cost

Gain an Inspiration Charge when you Spend Mana on Upfront
Costs or Effects of Supported Skills
Lose all Inspiration Charges after Spending a total of 922 Mana on Upfront Costs and Effects of Supported Skills
Supported Skills deal 5% more Elemental Damage per Inspiration Charge
Supported Skills have 8% increased Critical Strike Chance per Inspiration Charge
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills, making them repeat when cast. Cannot support Vaal skills, totem skills, brand skills, channelling skills, triggered skills, instant skills, retaliation skills, blink skills, or skills with a reservation.
explicitMods: Supported Skills Repeat an additional 2 times
Supported Skills have 65% more Cast Speed
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage
Supported Skills have 26% increased Area of Effect per Repeat
Supported Skills deal 16% more Spell Damage per Repeat
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: She gazed into the mirror...
and the mirror gazed back.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports projectile skills.
explicitMods: Projectiles from Supported Skills Pierce 4 additional Targets

Supported Skills deal 20% more Projectile Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Launches unpredictable sparks in all directions that move randomly until they hit an enemy or expire.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Increased Critical Strikes
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Acceleration Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
You have Replenishing Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

name: Nebulis
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality
implicitMods: Adds 17 to 31 Fire Damage to Spells
Enemies you Kill have a 29% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Physical Damage
explicitMods: 10% increased Elemental Damage per 1% Fire, Cold, or Lightning Resistance above 75%
flavourText: The vastness of the cosmos holds energies beyond comprehension,
should one have the fortitude to grasp them.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies in an area at both ends of the teleport. Deals higher damage to chilled enemies, then removes chill from them. Cannot be supported by Unleash.
explicitMods: This Spell's Cast Time is added to its Cooldown if Triggered
16% more Damage with Hits per 5% Chill Effect on Enemy

explicitMods: Removes 80% of your maximum Energy Shield on use
You take 50% of your maximum Life as Chaos Damage on use

flavourText: Doedre Darktongue knew the Way of the Thaumaturge.
In order to receive, one must give... without hesitation.

name: Annihilation's Approach

flavourText: Pray that the flames find fascination,
for the true end follows when the great eye closes.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Animates a melee weapon or armour, attaching it to an invisible Guardian that fights by your side. Animating multiple items attaches them to the same Guardian. You cannot animate unidentified items. Cannot be used by Traps or Mines. If your Guardian dies you cannot summon an Animated Guardian again in that area.
explicitMods: Can use Items requiring up to Level 100

5% chance to receive additional Weapons when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
Monsters have 5% chance to Duplicate dropped Rogue's Marker

fracturedMods: 60% increased Critical Strike Chance against Shocked Enemies

Buff can take 2403 Damage

flavourText: "The science is... incomprehensible at best. Nearest I can tell, the Arcana exhibits
a blast of wrath once it has been fully charged, and when directed at the Elder
will force it to take on the form it held before it entered our dimension."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Recalls all minions that are following you to your location, and grants them a temporary life regeneration effect.

name: Damnation Locket
explicitMods: +2 to Level of all Skill Gems

name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: The Gull
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
90% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
41% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

flavourText: "Although we are two bodies, we are of one mind, one heart, drifting
through the cosmos, in search of purpose. The moment we cross paths,
both fleeting and eternal, our eyes are opened to our potential."
